'''O-Bin''', also known as '''Bin''',<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> was a [[Teaching Guide]] at the [[Learning Circle]] on the planet of [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]] during the rule of [[V-Tan]] and [[O-Vieve]]. She was strict with her students, especially [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]].<ref name="The Fight for Truth" /> O-Bin habitually wore her hair pulled in a severe style back behind her ears, along with a customary [[brown]] tunic and [[black]] trousers.<ref name="CSWE" />
